name: cortisol-meter
title: Cortisol Meter
description: Manually track cortisol as low, medium, or high from Raycast and the macOS menu bar.
author: smexey

commands.name: increase-cortisol
commands.title: Increase Cortisol
commands.description: Move the cortisol bucket up one level.

commands.name: lower-cortisol
commands.title: Lower Cortisol
commands.description: Move the cortisol bucket down one level.

commands.name: cortisol-menu-bar
commands.title: Cortisol Menu Bar
commands.description: Show the current cortisol bucket in the macOS menu bar.
